name: liter-llm
description: Universal LLM API client for 143 providers — chat, streaming, tools, embeddings, search, OCR, plus an OpenAI-compatible proxy and an MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Universal LLM client for 143 providers with proxy and MCP server
interface.longDescription: Call 143 LLM providers through one unified interface — chat, streaming, tool calling, embeddings, image generation, audio, moderation, web search, OCR, and reranking. Routes by `provider/model` prefix with built-in caching, rate limiting, cost tracking, budgets, and fallback. Ships an OpenAI-compatible proxy server and an auto-installing MCP server exposing 22 tools. The plugin's MCP launcher locates or downloads a version-matched `liter-llm` binary on first run.
defaultPrompt: Send a chat completion to openai/gpt-4o
Embed these documents and rank them
Run an OpenAI-compatible proxy for my team
